content.Description: User should be able to open the site
content.Acceptance Criteria: Site issue

content.Description: User should be able to create account using email and password
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Valid email and strong password required
2. Email must be unique
3. Password policy enforced
4. Verification email sent
5. Account active only after verification
6. Invalid inputs show error

content.Description: User should login using email and password
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Valid credentials login_x000D_
2. Invalid credentials show error_x000D_
3. Account locks after N failures_x000D_
4. Captcha appears after repeated failures_x000D_
5. Session created securely

content.Description: User should login using Google OAuth
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. OAuth consent shown_x000D_
2. New user auto-created_x000D_
3. Existing user mapped_x000D_
4. Token expiry handled_x000D_
5. Logout revokes token

content.Description: User should reset password using email link
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Reset link sent_x000D_
2. Link expires after configured time_x000D_
3. New password follows policy_x000D_
4. Old password invalid

content.Description: User should change password from profile
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Old password required_x000D_
2. New password policy enforced_x000D_
3. Cannot reuse last passwords_x000D_
4. Logout from all devices

content.Description: User should browse products with pagination and filters
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Pagination works_x000D_
2. Sorting works_x000D_
3. Filters work_x000D_
4. Out-of-stock marked

content.Description: User should search product using keywords
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Relevant results returned_x000D_
2. Partial words supported_x000D_
3. Typo tolerance works_x000D_
4. No-result state handled

content.Description: User should view product detail page
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Images load_x000D_
2. Variants selectable_x000D_
3. Price correct_x000D_
4. Stock shown_x000D_
5. Reviews visible

content.Description: User should add and manage reviews
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Only buyers can review_x000D_
2. Profanity filtered_x000D_
3. Edit and delete allowed_x000D_
4. Rating recalculated

content.Description: User should add product to cart
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. In-stock item added_x000D_
2. Quantity defaults to 1_x000D_
3. Cart icon updates_x000D_
4. Backend API called_x000D_
5. Out-of-stock blocked

content.Description: User should remove product from cart
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Item removed_x000D_
2. Total recalculated_x000D_
3. Empty cart shown_x000D_
4. Backend updated

content.Description: User should update quantity in cart
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Quantity updated_x000D_
2. Cannot exceed stock_x000D_
3. Price recalculated_x000D_
4. Invalid value rejected

content.Description: System should calculate final price correctly
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Tax applied_x000D_
2. Discount applied_x000D_
3. Rounding rules correct_x000D_
4. Frontend matches backend

content.Description: User should apply coupon code
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Valid coupon reduces total_x000D_
2. Expired coupon rejected_x000D_
3. Only one coupon allowed_x000D_
4. Removing restores price

content.Description: Guest user should checkout without login
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Email mandatory_x000D_
2. Address mandatory_x000D_
3. Order placed successfully_x000D_
4. Confirmation shown

content.Description: Logged in user should checkout faster
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Address auto-filled_x000D_
2. Profile email used_x000D_
3. Address change allowed_x000D_
4. Order placed

content.Description: User should pay using credit/debit card
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Valid card succeeds_x000D_
2. Invalid card fails_x000D_
3. 3DS handled_x000D_
4. Callback verified

content.Description: User should pay using UPI
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Valid UPI succeeds_x000D_
2. Timeout handled_x000D_
3. Retry allowed_x000D_
4. Duplicate callback ignored

content.Description: Order should not be created if payment fails
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. No order created
2. Cart preserved
3. Error shown
4. Retry possible

content.Description: Order should be created after payment success

2. Inventory reserved_x000D_
3. Confirmation sent_x000D_
4. Email triggered

2. Refund initiated_x000D_
3. Status updated_x000D_
4. Notification sent

2. Pickup scheduled_x000D_
3. Refund initiated_x000D_
4. Status updated

content.Description: Refund should go to original payment
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Refund API called_x000D_
2. Gateway confirms_x000D_
3. Status updated_x000D_
4. User notified

content.Description: User should receive partial refund
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Partial amount calculated_x000D_
2. Tax adjusted_x000D_
3. Ledger updated_x000D_
4. User notified

content.Description: Admin should add new product
content.Acceptance Criteria:

content.Description: Stock should update in real time

1. No overselling_x000D_
2. Concurrency handled_x000D_
3. Cache sync correct

content.Description: System should block SQL injection

1. Malicious payload rejected_x000D_
2. Logged in audit_x000D_
3. No DB corruption

content.Description: System should prevent CSRF attacks
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Token required_x000D_
2. Invalid token rejected_x000D_
3. Token rotated

content.Description: System should support 10k concurrent users
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. No crash_x000D_
2. SLA met_x000D_
3. No data loss_x000D_
4. Payments stable

content.Description: System should recover from DB failure
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Automatic failover_x000D_
2. No order loss_x000D_
3. No manual intervention

content.Description: System should send email notifications
content.Acceptance Criteria:
1. Correct template used_x000D_
2. Sent on order, cancel, refund_x000D_
3. Retry on failure_x000D_

3. Deep link works

attachments.content:
Sample Requirement Document
 Project: Jira Attachment Reader
Requirement ID: REQ-1001
User Story: As a user, I want to upload PDF attachments so that the system extracts readable text.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. PDF contains embedded selectable text.
2. Text can be searched using Ctrl+F.
3. PDF is generated from Word, not from a scanner.
